title: ammannia quadriciliata
intro: Ammannia quadriciliata, also known as A. auriculata, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Lythraceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting digestion. In traditional medicine, Ammannia quadriciliata is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be found in herbal supplements and teas.
